- 新增播完最后一个视频时暂停的开关，开启后会停在最后一帧而不是直接退出
- 优化现代播放器布局里的状态类按钮，循环、随机、锁定、静音等功能会用选项列表表达当前可选状态
- 修复带斜体等格式标签的字幕无法套用自定义字幕样式的问题

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Add an option to pause after the last video finishes, keeping the player on the final frame instead of exiting
- Improve state controls in the modern player layout so loop, shuffle, lock, mute, and similar controls use option lists for their available states
- Fix custom subtitle styling not applying to subtitles that contain formatting tags such as italics

</details>
